title: Bizarre Industries Figma Masterbrand Governed Migration Ledger

restoreStrategy.test: All 13 legacy page IDs, 7 current collection IDs, 2 local component-set IDs, and remote instance dependency keys were resolved by read-only Figma MCP queries before mutation.
restoreStrategy.limitation: This authorizes additive migration only. It is not authorization for deletion. Any destructive cleanup still requires a separate versioned restore artifact and a tested restoration procedure.

approvedVisualDirection.name: Continuous Lens
approvedVisualDirection.silhouette: smooth tangent-continuous asymmetric oval with broad orbital compression
approvedVisualDirection.logoRule: Original Gravity Well geometry; figure is entirely Signal Lime or entirely black, never mixed.

collections.disposition: retain then rebind; shadows remain effect styles
migrate real content to documentation/component properties; no canonical replacement

conflicts.finding: Legacy Figma and repository tokens encode the rejected sharp wedge/chamfer aperture.
conflicts.resolution: Quarantine the visual as noncanonical legacy evidence, remove notch semantics from the canonical target, and rebuild 06.01 from the owner-approved Continuous Lens direction.

conflicts.finding: The Figma file has 13 legacy pages, not the approved 104 permanent mirrored subjects.
conflicts.resolution: Preserve and map the 13 pages to 99.10-99.22 while building the 104 permanent pages separately.

conflicts.finding: The Figma file has 7 current collections and 219 variables; the approved canonical target is 9 collections and 173 variables.
conflicts.resolution: Create the canonical collections alongside the current ones, validate, then rebind one family at a time. No deletion.

checked: owner-selected Continuous Lens reference hash captured
7 current collection IDs and all 219 variables captured
modes, scopes, code syntax, and current values captured
18 text styles and 4 effect styles captured
2 local component sets, 23 variants, bound nodes, and nested dependencies captured
104 target subject IDs and exact labels captured
blockersForPublication: 06.01 smooth aperture vector has not yet passed same-input visual comparison
canonical 173-variable collections not yet created or rebound
Figma Make prototype not yet rebuilt from approved library
